productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Shirts
description: CompositionLight blue woven shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs that have a plaid fabric lining, buttoned placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest with a plaid piping on the mouth and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in water below 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpgrade youre simple sophisticated style in this light blue woven shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The plaid panels and the pocket on the upper left chest adds an interesting touch to this shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
